item.title: Stock Inventory Management System with GST Billing for Indian Shops
item.description: Manage stock, purchases, sales, GST invoices, printable receipts, WhatsApp or email sharing, reports, and business details from one simple inventory billing app for Indian shops and small businesses.

item.title: About the Inventory, GST Billing, and Stock Management Platform | Mera Dukan Mera Godam
item.description: Learn how Dugam helps Indian shops, retailers, wholesalers, showrooms, and storekeepers manage stock, GST billing, receipts, purchases, sales, and reports with a simple workflow.

item.title: Inventory, GST Billing, Stock, and Receipt Software FAQ | Mera Dukan Mera Godam
item.description: Read practical answers about stock management, GST invoice creation, purchase and sale records, low-stock alerts, printable receipts, sharing, and reports for Indian businesses.

item.title: Support for Inventory, GST Billing, Receipts, and Reports | Mera Dukan Mera Godam
item.description: Get support for inventory setup, GST invoices, receipt printing, stock movement, report usage, business profile details, and invoice or sharing workflows.

item.title: Privacy Policy | Mera Dukan Mera Godam
item.description: Read the privacy policy for Dugam to understand how account, inventory, billing, and business data is handled.

item.title: Terms and Conditions | Mera Dukan Mera Godam
item.description: Review the terms and conditions for using Dugam inventory, stock management, GST billing, receipt, and reporting software.

item.title: Stock Inventory Management System with GST Billing for Indian Shops
item.description: Manage stock, purchases, sales, GST invoices, printable receipts, WhatsApp or email sharing, reports, and business details from one simple inventory billing app for Indian shops and small businesses.
